guidance: use this check to challenge the explanation: The student's description is incorrect. Attention mechanisms in neural networks typically involve tokens attending to all other tokens in the sequence, not just the previous one. This allows the model to capture non-local dependencies which are crucial for tasks like machine translation and text summarization.
title: Catch this misconception pattern
trigger: The attention mechanism works by having each token look only at the token immediately before it, passing information forward one step at a time.

guidance: use this check to challenge the explanation: The student's description is overly simplistic and does not accurately represent how an attention mechanism works. Attention mechanisms allow tokens to attend to any part of the input sequence, not just the token immediately before them.
title: Catch this misconception pattern
trigger: The attention mechanism works by having each token look only at the token immediately before it, passing information forward one step at a time.
